content:
🔥 jarvis | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: A private, always-on AI assistant for everyday tasks and conversations that respects user data privacy.
✨ Key Features: • 100% local processing (offline) • Privacy-focused with automatic sensitive data redaction • Natural conversational AI • Context-aware responses • Unlimited memory
📖 Summary: Jarvis is a 100% private, offline AI voice assistant that runs locally on your computer. It allows for natural conversational interaction, remembers context, and can integrate with various tools and applications without sending data to the cloud.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
